title: causes relation (ONT-R-09)
description: USE FOR: FailureMode causes effect (free-text effect string); AccidentCase causes causal_factor. Note: causes is NOT a graph between entities only — sometimes the object is a free-text effect description. v0.1.0 keeps the object as URI for graph uniformity; free-text effects go into FailureMode.effects array (entity-side). Schema version: 0.1.0.

chain_position.description: Optional. Position in the causal chain — proximate (immediate cause), contributing (factor), or root (root cause).
